JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR.title: Star Skill
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR.description: Miraculous skills driven by Star Power. Their values are influenced by Star Skill Quality.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCEPOWER.title: Endurance
JIANGXIAOMOD-PASSIVE.title: Passive Star Skill
JIANGXIAOMOD-PASSIVE.description: Does not need to be activated manually.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODUNARMED.title: Unarmed Combat
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODUNARMED.descrip: Represents proficiency in unarmed combat. Playing a card of this type increases Unarmed Combat points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBLADE.title: Xia Style Blade
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBLADE.descripti: Represents proficiency in Xia Style Blade. Playing a card of this type increases Xia Style Blade points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBOW.title: Archery Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBOW.description: Represents proficiency in archery. Playing a card of this type increases Archery Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODDAGGER.title: Dagger Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODDAGGER.descript: Represents proficiency in daggers. Playing a card of this type increases Dagger Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODHALBERD.title: Sky Square Halberd Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODHALBERD.descrip: Represents proficiency in the Sky Square Halberd. Playing a card of this type increases Sky Square Halberd points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODCOMBATKNIFE.des: Represents proficiency in combat knives. Playing a card of this type increases Combat Knife points.
